description: High quality text-to-image with strong typography support

model._hint: Base: stabilityai/stable-diffusion-3-medium-diffusers — MMDiT architecture (Multimodal Diffusion Transformer). Three text encoders: OpenCLIP-ViT/G, CLIP-ViT/L, and T5-xxl. Gated model — HF account agreement required. ~10 GB peak; sequential_cpu_offload recommended on ≤16 GB.

generation._hint: 28 steps recommended per model card. Range: 20–40. | 7.0 is the official default. Range: 4.5–10. Lower values give softer, more painterly results. | Native 1024×1024. Supports arbitrary resolutions up to ~1 MP.

system._hint: ~10 GB peak; sequential_cpu_offload: enabled (required for large models)

notes.about: Generates high-quality images with excellent text rendering and photorealistic or artistic outputs. Uses three text encoders for superior prompt understanding. Notably better at rendering legible text than SD 1.5 / SDXL.
notes.prompt_guide:
No trigger word. Use detailed descriptive prompts — the T5 encoder understands long natural language descriptions well. Examples: 'a cinematic portrait of an astronaut standing on Mars, dramatic sunset behind them', 'a logo reading HELLO WORLD in bold neon letters on a dark background', 'watercolor painting of a cat sitting in a sunlit window'.

Negative prompt: Negative prompts are supported and effective. Example: 'blurry, low quality, distorted, artifacts, watermark, text'.
